criteria.name: accessibility_compliance
criteria.description: Navigate/edit points/handles via controls, create constraints, inspect metrics, scope variants, add hints, preview focus/state, merge/approve, and export without pointer → focus/state match.
criteria.reasoning: Keyboard-only traversal reached the editor, variant controls, anchor fields, constraints, hints, preview, approval, and export. Keyboard activation visibly changed the Hover variant, solved an equal constraint, applied a size hint, entered read-only preview, approved the family, and exported JSON. Evidence: accessibility_compliance-shared.png; accessibility_compliance-preview.png

criteria.name: accessibility_catchall
criteria.description: The app exhibits a significant, browser-observable defect in accessibility that is NOT covered by any other criterion in this file. If the defect is already covered — even partially — by another criterion in this file, answer no here and let that criterion carry it.
criteria.reasoning: No additional significant accessibility defect was observed; interactive controls were keyboard reachable and exposed meaningful names or visible labels. Evidence: accessibility_compliance-shared.png

criteria.name: core_loop
criteria.description: Edit/transform paths, constrain, inspect metrics, scope variants, hint sizes, branch/merge, preview states, approve, and export → all geometry/files agree.
criteria.reasoning: Observed editing, mirroring, constraints, variants, hints, branching/diff, preview, approval, merge, and JSON export workflows functioning. Evidence: core_loop-merge.png

criteria.name: anchor_segment_editor_drag
criteria.description: Drag an anchor on the 24x24 grid → path immediately updates.
criteria.reasoning: Dragged anchor a1 on the grid; path changed immediately from x=5 to x=6. Evidence: anchor_segment_editor_drag-shared.png

criteria.name: anchor_segment_keyboard
criteria.description: Select an anchor and move it with the keyboard → moves exactly by grid units.
criteria.reasoning: ArrowRight moved the selected anchor by exactly one grid unit and updated the path. Evidence: anchor_segment_keyboard-shared.png

criteria.name: path_mirror_transform
criteria.description: Select a path and apply mirror transform → path mirrors accurately.
criteria.reasoning: Mirror Transform produced mirrored coordinates and displayed before/after outlines. Evidence: path_mirror_transform-shared.png

criteria.name: add_explicit_constraint
criteria.description: Add an explicit equal constraint between two segments → constraint preview shows alignment.
criteria.reasoning: Adding the equal constraint visibly created ACTIVE EQUAL / a1 = a2. Evidence: add_explicit_constraint-shared.png

criteria.name: constraint_cycle_prevention
criteria.description: Attempt to create a conflicting constraint → constraint solver rejects and shows error.
criteria.reasoning: A duplicate conflicting constraint was rejected with an overdetermined solver error. Evidence: constraint_cycle_prevention-shared.png

criteria.name: variant_inheritance
criteria.description: Edit base geometry → filled variant updates to reflect change.
criteria.reasoning: Editing base geometry changed the Filled inherited path accordingly. Evidence: variant_inheritance-shared.png

criteria.name: variant_override_reset
criteria.description: Override filled variant and then reset → reverts to base geometry.
criteria.reasoning: After overriding Filled, Reset Variant restored the base geometry and confirmed the reset. Evidence: variant_override_reset-shared.png

criteria.name: multi_size_hint
criteria.description: Add a 16px hint → hint adjusts path without changing base geometry.
criteria.reasoning: Toggling the 16px hint changed its displayed adjustment to +0.5px while base geometry remained represented separately. Evidence: multi_size_hint-shared.png

criteria.name: branch_and_compare
criteria.description: Create a branch, edit path, view diff → dual overlays correctly highlight changes.
criteria.reasoning: Created optical-pass, edited geometry, and displayed dashed-main/solid-branch diff overlays with one changed anchor. Evidence: branch_and_compare-shared.png

criteria.name: export_json_schema
criteria.description: Export JSON → outputs valid project schema containing current paths and constraints.
criteria.reasoning: Export JSON produced a downloadable icon-family-optical-studio.json artifact; the registered export returned a structured schema with anchors, constraints, hints, and symbols. Evidence: export_json_schema-shared.png

criteria.name: import_valid_json
criteria.description: Import previously exported JSON → reconstructs exact paths and constraints.
criteria.reasoning: Imported a valid family JSON through the visible UI; success appeared and the path reconstructed as M4 4 L20 4 L20 20 L4 20 Z. Evidence: import_valid_json-shared.png

criteria.name: import_invalid_json
criteria.description: Import malformed JSON → shows error and retains previous state.
criteria.reasoning: Malformed JSON showed an Import error and retained the prior path unchanged. Evidence: import_invalid_json-shared.png

criteria.name: causal_motion
criteria.description: Drag/transform, solve constraint, propagate inheritance, switch size/state/branch overlay, then repeat reduced → causal endpoints and values agree.
criteria.reasoning: Drag moved A1 to 5,4; constraint solving snapped A2 to the same endpoint, and the Filled/32px branch comparison showed matching before/after paths. Repeating the same workflow under reduced motion produced the same A1=5,4 endpoint. Evidence: causal_motion-shared.png

criteria.name: animate_constraint_solve
criteria.description: Commit constraint solve → animates anchors moving into place.
criteria.reasoning: Clicking Add Equal Constraint produced the visible solver result with dashed before and solid after paths; the solved path exposed a 0.28s ease-in-out d-transition. Evidence: animate_constraint_solve-shared.png

criteria.name: reduced_motion_fallback
criteria.description: With prefers-reduced-motion, constraints snap immediately with clear before/after outlines.
criteria.reasoning: In the reduced-motion browser, prefers-reduced-motion matched true; after solving, before/after outlines were both immediately present with transition and animation computed as none. Evidence: reduced_motion_fallback-shared.png
